title: Biologist

rationales.taskAutomation: AI can analyze sequencing data and draft literature reviews, but field sampling, wet-lab experimentation, and specimen judgment stay hands-on.
rationales.toolMaturity: Bioinformatics and AI-assisted sequence-analysis tools are mature for genomics work but less developed for field ecology and specimen study.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is strongest in genomics and biotech labs; field-based ecology and wildlife biology still rely on manual methods.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run sequence-analysis and literature-synthesis pipelines, but fieldwork, specimen collection, and experiment design need a biologist present.

tasksAtRisk: Literature review synthesis for research proposals
tasksGrowing: Field sampling and ecological survey work
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 19-1029, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Genomic analysis and literature synthesis are increasingly AI-assisted, but fieldwork and wet-lab experimentation still need a biologist's hands and judgment on the actual organism.
